commit.subject: LU-0000 misc: Add missing ENTRY/EXIT/RETURN
commit.message:
LU-0000 misc: Add missing ENTRY/EXIT/RETURN

Some functions had "ENTRY" but no "RETURN". Others had "RETURN" but
no "ENTRY".
Also, GOTO message was renamed to specify "jumping" not "leaving" to
be able to have RETURN even when a function exits without going
through GOTO.

Test-Parameters: ignore
Signed-off-by: Cyril Bordage <cbordage@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I26c75efe369dd8e4d5bee0df4496d5f9afd05af9
